overall.description: A first-person walk through a post-apocalyptic urban environment in a video game (Fallout 4), featuring ruined concrete buildings, a collapsed billboard structure, and overcast weather. The camera moves steadily forward along a debris-strewn street, passing under traffic lights and approaching a large ruined billboard.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined city street with overhead traffic signals

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a ruined street toward a large collapsed billboard structure

horizontal metal bar suspended over the road with traffic lights attached
large metal framework of a collapsed billboard with tattered canvas remains
damaged multi-story concrete building with broken windows behind the billboard
statue of a person standing on a pedestal
large curved ruined structure visible in the distant background
back of a road sign facing away from the camera

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desolate post-apocalyptic street with a damaged road surface. Overhead, a traffic signal frame spans the street, while a large collapsed billboard structure dominates the center distance. A concrete statue stands on the right side, and ruined buildings frame the background under an overcast sky.

events.description: concrete statue figure passes out of view to the right rear

agents.ego_description: continuing forward beneath the traffic signal frame toward the collapsed billboard

segments.scene_description: The camera moves closer to the collapsed billboard structure, passing beneath the overhead traffic signal frame which shifts toward the right side of the frame. The concrete statue and left traffic pole fall behind and exit the frame, while the ruined concrete building behind the billboard becomes more detailed.

agents.ego_description: approaching very close to the collapsed billboard, looking up at the damaged structure

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches very close to the collapsed billboard structure, which now dominates the center of the frame. The overhead traffic signals have passed out of view behind the camera, and the ruined concrete building is visible through the billboard's metal framework. The ground shows significant damage with large potholes filled with water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a desolate urban street that gradually narrows its focus toward a massive collapsed billboard. It begins on a damaged road surface under an overcast sky, with a traffic signal frame spanning the street and a concrete statue standing to the right. As the camera advances, it passes beneath the overhead signal frame, causing the statue and the left traffic pole to recede and exit the frame while the ruined concrete buildings in the distance grow more detailed. The scene then shifts to a close-up perspective of the billboard's metal framework, which now dominates the center of the view and partially obscures the building behind it. Finally, the camera glides over a heavily weathered ground marked by large, water-filled potholes as it reaches the base of the wreckage.
